summary: Password Management features testing complete. Backend: 21/21 tests passed covering admin reset, forgot password, change password (forced/normal), token validation. Frontend: All UI components working correctly - Login page has 'Forgot password?' link, Forgot Password page works, Users page has Reset Password button (key icon), Reset Password dialog fully functional with 'Force change on login' checkbox, 'Must Change PW' badge displays correctly. ONE ISSUE: Login redirect to /change-password?forced=true is NOT working - users with must_change_password=true land on dashboard instead of being forced to change password page.

ui_bugs.issue: After login, users with must_change_password=true are NOT redirected to /change-password?forced=true. They land on dashboard instead. Toast 'Please change your password' shows but redirect does not work.
ui_bugs.root_cause: Race condition between setIsAuthenticated(true) and navigate() - React re-renders routes before navigation completes, and since isAuthenticated is now true, the '/' route takes precedence
ui_bugs.suggested_fix: Option 1: Check must_change_password in the '/' route component and redirect from there. Option 2: Use useEffect in App.js to check user.must_change_password and redirect. Option 3: Navigate before setting isAuthenticated state.

issues: Console shows hydration warnings about <span> in <tbody> - this is from Emergent's visual editor wrapper, doesn't affect functionality

action_items: FIX (HIGH): Login redirect for must_change_password users - currently they land on dashboard instead of /change-password?forced=true. The toast shows but navigation fails due to React state/route timing.
critical_code_review_comments: backend/routers/auth.py:200-218 - admin_reset_password endpoint correctly updates password hash and must_change_password flag
backend/routers/auth.py:222-246 - change_password correctly handles forced change (no current_password required) vs normal change
backend/routers/auth.py:249-313 - forgot_password properly creates reset token, prevents email enumeration by returning same message for all emails
backend/routers/auth.py:317-341 - reset_password_with_token validates token expiry and deletes used token
backend/routers/auth.py:79-103 - login correctly returns must_change_password flag from user document
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.jsx:28-32 - BUG: navigate('/change-password?forced=true') called after setIsAuthenticated(true), but route re-render wins the race
frontend/src/pages/UsersPage.jsx:233-260 - Reset password dialog correctly implemented with new_password, confirm_password, must_change_on_login checkbox
frontend/src/pages/UsersPage.jsx:495-499 - 'Must Change PW' badge correctly displays for users with must_change_password=true
frontend/src/pages/ChangePasswordPage.jsx:20-45 - Correctly hides current password field when ?forced=true, shows 'Password Change Required' title

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all UI elements working, redirect bug found)

seed_data_creation: Test users created and cleaned up during backend pytest run. Limited User (test.limited@ssc.com) exists with must_change_password=true.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Password management features implemented. Backend fully working. Frontend has one HIGH priority bug: login redirect for must_change_password users not working - fix in LoginPage.jsx or App.js needed. Key test data-testids: forgot-password-link, forgot-password-card, forgot-email-input, send-reset-link-button, reset-email-sent-card, reset-password-button (key icon on users page), reset-password-dialog, reset-new-password, reset-confirm-password, must-change-checkbox, submit-reset-button, change-password-card, new-password-input, confirm-password-input, change-password-button.

frontend_ui_tests.Login redirect for must_change_password: FAIL - users land on dashboard instead of /change-password?forced=true

mocked_apis.note: Forgot password email sending requires SMTP config in Settings. Without SMTP, endpoint works but no actual email is sent.

rca_of_the_issue.issue: Login redirect for must_change_password users not working
reproduction_steps: 1. Login as test.limited@ssc.com / newpass123 (user has must_change_password=true)
3. Actual: Lands on / (dashboard) with toast 'Please change your password'
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: In LoginPage.jsx lines 28-32, setIsAuthenticated(true) is called before navigate('/change-password?forced=true'). The state change triggers React re-render which evaluates routes in App.js. Since isAuthenticated is now true, the '/' route renders DashboardPage, overriding the pending navigation.
suggested_mitigations: Option 1 (Recommended): In App.js, modify the '/' route to check user.must_change_password and redirect to /change-password?forced=true before rendering DashboardPage
Option 2: In LoginPage.jsx, call navigate() BEFORE setIsAuthenticated() and return early
Option 3: Use useEffect in App.js to monitor user.must_change_password and redirect globally
